rationale: Single one-line HTML edit to cjb-workflow-health.html inside the Pillar 2 trigger-flows table, adding a new <tr> row for 'Scheduled activation + parallel triggers + >3 trigger cap' with the $2,900/mo dollar-at-risk figure and the supporting cells (gap, opportunity).
